Annotation2: The Australian Labor Party saw a decline in #popularity in the late 2000s and early 2010s, #but has been slowly increasing in recent years.

Annotation1: In more recent years, minor parties #have begun to win more seats.
Since 2010, the Australian Greens have #maintained relatively consistent popularity.
In the last 2 decades, the popularity of the Liberal-National #Coalition has been gradually declining.
